amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 15 — paragraph 3 — subparagraph 2
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 15 — paragraph 3 — subparagraph 2

## Text proposed by the Commission

The robustness of high-risk AI systems may be achieved through technical redundancy solutions, which may include backup or fail-safe plans.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The robustness of high-risk AI systems may be achieved by the appropriate provider with input from the user, where necessary, through technical redundancy solutions, which may include backup or fail-safe plans.
commission_text: The robustness of high-risk AI systems may be achieved through technical redundancy solutions, which may include backup or fail-safe plans.
parliament_text: The robustness of high-risk AI systems may be achieved by the appropriate provider with input from the user, where necessary, through technical redundancy solutions, which may include backup or fail-safe plans.
